toolbar.saveFormatPrompt: Choose save format: ecdprt or stl
toolbar.saveFormatInvalid: Invalid format. Enter ecdprt or stl.

limits.title: Limits
limits.installTypeHint: Choose the limit type to add. Fields and the add action stay on the right panel once you pick faces.
limits.selectLinkedFaces: Show linked faces on the model
limits.pickLimitToEdit: Unlock limits, then click a limit to edit or delete it.
limits.editBlockHint: BLOCK has no numeric parameters — you can remove it.
limits.editPanelYSameNote: Y span limits match X; the Y measurement pair is still stored on the constraint.
limits.editInvalid: Values do not satisfy this limit type.
limits.empty: No limits in this prepared part.
limits.onlyPrepared: Limits are available only for ECDPRT files.

dimensions.title: Dimensions
dimensions.placeholderNoModel: Load a model to use dimensions.
dimensions.elementaryEmpty: No elementary limits with a measurable gap between planes (pairs of faces / prepared elements).

leftPanel.dropHint: Drag STL here or click "Load model" in the toolbar.

picking.title: Selection
picking.hint: Click near a vertex, a creased edge, or a face. A normal click replaces the entire selection; Shift+click adds the item or removes it if it is already selected. Left-click the same selected item again (without Shift) to deselect it. Left-click empty space or the grid (without Shift) to clear. Orbit the view with the middle mouse button (press the wheel and drag).

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.hint: Set color or texture and opacity. Use the View tab for display mode (solid, textured, edges).

faceDistance.title: Distance between faces
faceDistance.hint: Each CAD face is usually two triangles in STL; one click selects the whole coplanar patch. Select two opposite (parallel) patches: first click, then Shift+click the second. Coordinates are treated as millimetres (typical STL export). Stretching runs along a single axis — the direction between the two planes.
faceDistance.hintPanelThicknessAxis: The selected gap matches stored panel thickness. Edit thickness here; when the panel uses element pairs, length and width (in-plane spans) appear below.
faceDistance.hintProfilStretch: The selected planes match this part’s PROFILE stretch axis. Adjust the stretch gap — frozen PROFILE dimensions remain constrained after apply.

boundHints.belowMin: This value is below the allowed minimum for this pair (≥ {{minMm}} mm).
boundHints.aboveMax: This value is above the allowed maximum for this pair (≤ {{maxMm}} mm).
boundHints.constMismatch: CONST on this pair requires exactly {{exactMm}} mm.

profilBoundHints.belowStretchMin: This value is below the PROFILE stretch minimum (≥ {{minMm}} mm when limits are on).
profilBoundHints.aboveStretchMax: This value is above the PROFILE stretch maximum (≤ {{maxMm}} mm when limits are on).

errors.notParallel: The two faces are not parallel enough. Pick two opposite planar faces.
errors.tooThin: The distance between the faces is too small to resize reliably.
errors.invalidTarget: Enter a positive distance in millimetres.
errors.invalidGeometry: The model or selection is not valid for this operation.
errors.needSecondPlanarFace: Only one planar region is selected. Shift+click the opposite face to add the second patch.
errors.tooManyPlanarGroups: The selection splits into more than two planar regions. Clear the selection and pick only two opposite faces.
errors.lockedByBlock: Size is locked by BLOCK limit.
errors.lockedExact: Size is fixed by CONST limit.
errors.lockedMin: Size is below allowed MIN (or PROFIL minimum stretch, if set).
errors.lockedMax: Size is above allowed MAX/PROFIL maximum.
errors.constraintBrokenConst: After editing, CONST distance limit between elements would be violated.
errors.constraintBrokenMin: After editing, distance between elements would be below MIN.
errors.constraintBrokenMax: After editing, distance between elements would be above MAX.
errors.constraintBrokenProfil: After editing, distance between elements would be above PROFIL maximum.
errors.constraintBrokenProfilMin: After editing, the PROFIL stretch gap would be below the minimum.
errors.profilWrongTarget: PROFIL allows resizing only for the designated element pair.
errors.constraintPanelBroken: After editing, PANEL bounds (thickness or plane dimensions) would be violated.

limits.title: Face limits
limits.waitingStretchSelection: Limits placement is on. Select two opposite planar regions (faces or edges—no vertices-only selection), same workflow as Distance between faces, then add limits here.
limits.blockWorkflowHint: BLOCK fixes the entire model — no face selection. Adding it blocks all size changes.
limits.hint: Add MINMAX (single range with optional MIN and required MAX), CONST, PROFIL, BLOCK, or PANEL on selected faces.
limits.panelWorkflowIntro: PANEL has three parts: (1) thickness as CONST, (2) X span as MIN/MAX, (3) Y span as MIN/MAX. Lock a thickness pair first, then capture measurement pairs and bounds for each span.
limits.panelThicknessFrozenHint: Faces stay fixed after lock. Enter thickness in mm — a CONST limit is created for this pair. X/Y capture uses the current selection.
limits.panelThicknessLockPending: Waiting for a valid parallel pair in the current selection…
limits.panelThicknessSelectionUnlockedForXY: Thickness locked. Use Select X / Y pair, pick span faces, then Confirm — thickness faces are restored after each confirm.
limits.panelFacesForXSpanHint: Different selection: two planar groups for the X span, then Confirm on the X button — thickness stays locked.
limits.panelFacesForYSpanHint: Same for Y — two planar groups for the Y span, then Confirm on the Y button.
limits.panelPickTwoPlanesHint: Select two opposite planar regions (first click, then Shift+click), same as stretch.
limits.panelSpanArmHintX: Choose two opposite planar groups for the X span, then press Confirm.
limits.panelSpanArmHintY: Choose two opposite planar groups for the Y span, then press Confirm.
limits.panelYSameAsX: Y span limits (MIN/MAX mm) same as X — Y measurement pair is chosen above
limits.profilWorkflowIntro: PROFIL: select the stretch pair first (the gap you may change). Then assign frozen dimensions 1 and 2 — each is two opposite planar groups (CONST-like). Finally enter the stretch band (MAX required; optional MIN) and add the limit.
limits.profilStretchRestrictMin: Also set a minimum stretch gap
limits.profilFrozenPickHint: Press "Select frozen dimension 1" with a valid stretch pair — it locks that pair. Change the selection to the two planar groups for frozen dimension 1, then press Confirm (same button). Use "Select frozen dimension 2" only after frozen 1 is set; same pick → confirm flow.
limits.profilFrozenArmHint: Choose two opposite planar groups for frozen dimension {{n}}, then press Confirm.
limits.profilStretchPairLocked: Stretch pair is locked for this PROFIL (selection is restored after each confirm).
limits.profilStretchAfterFrozenHint: When both frozens are set, enter MAX (and optional MIN) for the stretch gap, then add the limit. The locked stretch pair is used for geometry.
limits.removeDisabledWhenLocked: Unlock limits on the Model & load panel to remove or edit.

errors.needTwoPlanarGroups: Exactly two planar face groups are required for this limit.
errors.invalidRange: On each axis, MIN must not exceed MAX.
errors.needPanelThickness: PANEL requires a valid current distance (freeze thickness first).
errors.needPanelCapturedX: Set the X measurement pair (select → confirm) before adding.
errors.needPanelCapturedY: Set the Y measurement pair (select → confirm) before adding.
errors.needPanelDistinctXYPairs: X and Y measurement pairs must use different prepared-element pairs (different planes).
errors.panelFinishOrCancelSpanPick: Confirm or cancel the current X/Y measurement pair pick before continuing.
errors.needProfilFrozenDims: Set both frozen dimensions (pick → confirm each) before adding PROFIL.
errors.needProfilStretchLocked: Press "Select frozen dimension 1" while the stretch pair is valid to lock it before adding PROFIL.
errors.needProfilFrozen1First: Set frozen dimension 1 before frozen dimension 2.
errors.profilFinishOrCancelFrozenPick: Confirm or cancel the current frozen-dimension pick before continuing.
errors.dimensionSlotOccupied: A limit already exists for this model dimension. Choose another pair direction.
errors.dimensionFullOccupied: Existing limits already occupy all model dimensions. Remove them first.

rightPanel.scaleHint: X / Y / Z — after loading a model.
rightPanel.rotationHint: Axis angles — after loading a model.
